Froslass

#0477 Dusknoir #0479 Rotom
  • Contents
  • Info
  • Base stats
  • Evolution chart
  • Pokédex entries
  • Moves learned
  • Sprites
  • Locations
  • Language

Froslass is an Ice/Ghost type Pokémon introduced in Generation 4.

Froslass Mega Froslass

Additional artwork

Pokédex data

National № 0478
Type Ice Ghost
Species Snow Land Pokémon
Height 1.3 m (4′03″)
Weight 26.6 kg (58.6 lbs)
Abilities 1. Snow Cloak
Cursed Body (hidden ability)
Local № 0208 (Platinum)
0181 (Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire)
0248 (Sun/Moon — Alola dex)
0325 (U.Sun/U.Moon — Alola dex)
0081 (Sword/Shield)
0207 (Legends: Arceus)
0359 (Scarlet/Violet)
0171 (Legends: Z-A)
0027 (The Crown Tundra)
0174 (The Teal Mask)

Training

EV yield 2 Speed
Catch rate 75 (9.8% with PokéBall, full HP)
Base Friendship 50 (normal)
Base Exp. 168
Growth Rate Medium Fast

Breeding

Egg Groups Fairy, Mineral
Gender 0% male, 100% female
Egg cycles 20 (4,884–5,140 steps)

The ranges shown on the right are for a level 100 Pokémon. Maximum values are based on a beneficial nature, 252 EVs, 31 IVs; minimum values are based on a hindering nature, 0 EVs, 0 IVs.

Evolution chart

#0361
Snorunt
Ice
(Level 42)
#0362
Glalie
Ice
(use Dawn Stone, Female)
#0478
Froslass
Ice · Ghost

Froslass changes

  • In Generation 4, Froslass has a base experience yield of 187.
  • In Generations 4-7, Froslass has a base Friendship value of 70.

Pokédex entries

Diamond
Pearl		 It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees F. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
Platinum It freezes prey by blowing its -58 degrees F breath. It is said to then secretly display its prey.
HeartGold Legends in snowy regions say that a woman who was lost on an icy mountain was reborn as FROSLASS.
SoulSilver Legends in snowy regions say that a woman who was lost on an icy mountain was reborn as FROSLASS
Black
White
Black 2
White 2		 It freezes prey by blowing its -58 degrees F breath. It is said to then secretly display its prey.
X
Omega Ruby		 It freezes foes with an icy breath nearly -60 degrees Fahrenheit. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
Y
Alpha Sapphire		 Legends in snowy regions say that a woman who was lost on an icy mountain was reborn as Froslass.
Sun When it finds humans or Pokémon it likes, it freezes them and takes them to its chilly den, where they become decorations.
Moon The soul of a woman lost on a snowy mountain possessed an icicle, becoming this Pokémon. The food it most relishes is the souls of men.
Ultra Sun It freezes hikers who have come to climb snowy mountains and carries them back to its home. It only goes after men it thinks are handsome.
Ultra Moon It’s said that on nights of terrible blizzards, it comes down to human settlements. If you hear it knocking at your door, do not open it!
Sword After a woman met her end on a snowy mountain, her regrets lingered on. From them, this Pokémon was born. Its favorite food is frozen souls.
Shield It spits out cold air of nearly −60 degrees Fahrenheit to freeze its quarry. It brings frozen prey back to its lair and neatly lines them up.
Brilliant Diamond
Shining Pearl		 It freezes foes with an icy breath that is nearly −60 degrees Fahrenheit. What seems to be its body is actually hollow.
Legends: Arceus A Pokémon inhabited by the soul of a woman who died bearing a grudge in the snowy mountains. Legends of Froslass placing deathly curses on misbehaving men send shivers down my spine.
Scarlet When it finds humans or Pokémon it likes, it freezes them and takes them to its chilly den, where they become decorations.
Violet It freezes prey by blowing its −58 degree Fahrenheit breath. It is said to then secretly display its prey.

French Momartik
Italian Froslass
Spanish Froslass

Chinese (Traditional) 雪妖女

frost
frozen moisture
lass
a young female
